subject: docs(theme): make implementation doc project-agnostic
body:
Describe the build script pattern generically rather than referencing
this project's specific file paths and npm scripts. Implementation
suggestions should be reusable across projects.

Tags: documentation, theme
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-theme-color
Semver: patch
